meaning: adj.无重大事件的,平凡的,平静无事的
examples: He made an uneventful return to normal health.
The return trip was uneventful, the car running perfectly.
Generally speaking, the interiors of plates are geologically uneventful.
Buffett is putting the finishing touches on Berkshire, making his passing uneventful for the stock.
Looking ahead, participants expect the inevitable August slowdown to bring the summer to an uneventful end.
